data.title: Green Shift Commodities Ltd. granted 3,000,000 stock options to directors, officers, and consultants.
data.description: In Toronto on January 13, 2026, Green Shift Commodities Ltd. revealed that it has awarded 3,000,000 stock options (referred to as "Options") to a range of directors, officers, and consultants. This information comes from Green Shift, trading on TSXV as GCOM and OTCQB as GRCMF.

data.title: Carolinas contractors optimistic in 2026 despite uncertainties. Strong opportunities in healthcare, power, water/sewer, data center markets. AGC report highlights trends.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, as of January 13, 2026, the recently unveiled 2026 Construction Outlook by AGC of America indicates that contractors in the Carolinas are starting the year with a sense of careful positivity. This sentiment is particularly notable in sectors like healthcare, power, water/sewer, and data centers. The report highlights a notable trend of optimism among contractors in these industries.

data.title: NYC meme coin launched by Eric Adams crashes 81% in a day from $580M to $110M market cap due to suspicious activities.
data.description: Eric Adams, the former mayor of New York City, introduced a NYC meme coin that quickly reached a market cap of $580 million before crashing by 81% to $110 million. This was due to a wallet connected to the creator withdrawing $2.5 million in liquidity at the peak. The token, based on Solana, aimed to combat antisemitism and anti-Americanism while educating youngsters on blockchain technology. Within minutes of its launch, the coin's value shot up to $580 million but then dropped dramatically, causing around $500 million in losses. A wallet identified as 9Ty4M engaged in suspicious activity by creating one-sided liquidity pools on Meteora and withdrawing $2.5 million in USDC at its highest point. The wallet later added $1.5 million back after a 60% decrease in value without providing a reason for these movements. Additionally, an individual trader suffered a loss of $473,500, equivalent to a 63.5% decrease in their investment.

data.title: p-Chip Corp, Choice One Rx, and RxERP start trial showing digital traceability for DSCSA compliance, sponsored by Avantor, for Oncology, Urology, Rheumatology, and Gastroenterology drugs in pharmaceutical supply chain.
data.description: A trial in Chicago will showcase enhanced drug tracing technology for Oncology, Urology, Rheumatology, and Gastroenterology. The initiative aims to improve traceability within the pharmaceutical supply chain. This development is significant for the biotech industry, highlighting advancements in drug distribution and management.

data.title: Aramark will host a conference call to discuss Q1 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 10 at 8:30 am ET. Visit website for details.
data.description: Philadelphia-based Aramark, a prominent player in food and facilities management with a NYSE ticker symbol ARMK, disclosed plans to conduct a conference call to discuss its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026. The call is scheduled for February 10, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Ahead of the call, a detailed news release showcasing the results will be disseminated. The conference call can be accessed live through the Aramark Investor Relations webpage. Interested participants seeking to join via dial-in are encouraged to complete registration using the provided link.

data.title: Hundreds of students from across Oklahoma will celebrate educational options at School Choice Expo on Jan. 27 at Oklahoma State University-Tulsa.
data.description: Student and teachers in Tulsa, Oklahoma will come together to commemorate School Choice Week on Jan. 27, 2026. Approximately hundreds of students from various schools in the state will assemble at Oklahoma State University-Tulsa to express their appreciation for their educational institutions. They aim to showcase the significance of educational options and celebrate the schools they attend.

data.title: Icon Global sold Teton Ridge TR9 Ranch for $45 million to Theorem Ranch, expanding land and livestock acquisitions.
data.description: The Itkin family, owners of Theorem Ranch, have increased their land and livestock holdings, demonstrating a strong dedication to expanding Western Equestrian Sports. The purchase was conducted through Icon Global, who represented the seller, closing the deal on the former Teton property. This strategic move aligns with the Itkins' vision for growth and development in the industry.

data.title: Tulavi Therapeutics gets contract from Vizient for allay™ Hydrogel Cap to enhance healthcare.
data.description: Los Gatos, California - On January 13, 2026, Tulavi Therapeutics revealed that their allay™ Hydrogel Cap has been granted an Innovative Technology contract by Vizient®, a leading healthcare provider in the U.S. This contract aims to bring enhancements to the healthcare industry through innovative products. Vizient®, which is the largest provider-driven healthcare entity in the nation, has acknowledged the potential impact of Tulavi Therapeutics' product. This partnership signifies a significant step forward for Tulavi Therapeutics as they work to revolutionize healthcare.

data.title: Eminent Gold Corp. expands HSRP claims by 370 hectares at Hot Springs Range Project in Humboldt County.
data.description: Eminent Gold Corp. has recently announced the acquisition of 370 hectares of new claims at the Hot Springs Range Project in Humboldt County. This endeavor is under the ownership of Eminent and brings the total land coverage to 100%. The project is located in Humboldt County and the new claims were staked as part of the expansion strategy. The company is listed as TSXV: EMNT, OTCQB: EMGDF, and FSE: 7AB. The newly acquired claims mark a significant development in the growth of Eminent's presence in the region.

data.title: BTQ Technologies added to VanEck Quantum Computing UCITS ETF, increasing European access. Company on Nasdaq, CBOE CA, FSE.
data.description: Vancouver-based BTQ Technologies Corp., a quantum technology company (Nasdaq: BTQ, CBOE CA: BTQ, FSE: NG3), specializing in network security, disclosed its inclusion in the VanEck Quantum. The news was revealed on Jan. 13, 2026.

data.title: Fast-growing AI startup, Fortiv expands to U.S. amidst uncertain world, aiding business continuity.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in New York, a Copenhagen-based AI-powered business continuity startup, Fortiv, has announced its official entry into the U.S. market. With growing uncertainty in the global business landscape, U.S. enterprises are seeking quicker ways to enhance resilience. This move by Fortiv offers a solution for businesses looking to adapt amidst challenging conditions.

data.title: Superorganism, a VC firm for biodiversity, closes their debut fund at $25.9M, aiming to redefine capital for biodiversity.
data.description: In New York on January 13, 2026, leading investors are supporting a new nature and technology fund that seeks to transform how capital supports biodiversity. Superorganism, the inaugural venture capital firm focused on technology-based approaches to biodiversity, has successfully concluded its first fund.

data.title: Blubrry Podcasting promotes MacKenzie Bennett to Director of Marketing and Dave Clements to Support role.
data.description: In Coopersville, Michigan on January 13, 2026, Blubrry Podcasting, a renowned independent podcast hosting and services company, revealed the promotions of two vital team members. MacKenzie Bennett has been appointed as the Director of Marketing, while Dave Clements has been elevated to the role of Support.
